description: Explain financing options, store card offers, installment plans, promotional APRs, fees, eligibility notes, repayment periods, and responsible purchase tradeoffs.
responsibleFinanceRules: Do not guarantee approval, final APR, rewards value, savings, or financial outcomes.
Explain promotional APR expiration, deferred-interest risk, fees, repayment obligations, and eligibility conditions.
Offer lower-cost products or pay-in-full alternatives when they may better fit the shopper's budget.
